about.bio.1: My curiosity spans every dimension of the work I do — from the architecture of financial systems and spend management platforms to the behavioral psychology behind how people make decisions under complexity. That same drive pulls me toward continuous learning: studying how trust is built at a transaction level, how design systems scale across enterprise organizations, and how emerging AI tooling can be applied responsibly to amplify team velocity without sacrificing quality.
about.bio.2: What I'm told sets me apart most is the combination of strategic conviction and precise execution — the ability to hold the bar on craft while also communicating the design vision clearly to product, engineering, and executive partners. I don't separate leadership from making. The two sharpen each other.
about.quote.text: Great design in fintech is not about aesthetics. It is about building trust at every interaction — fast, clear, and earned.
about.title: A director who leads with craft and delivers with conviction
about.value.0.desc: Every fintech and spend management challenge begins with understanding the real friction users experience at moments of financial decision-making.
about.value.0.title: Discovery-first
about.value.1.desc: High-trust experiences are built in the details — a misplaced affordance or ambiguous billing state erodes confidence faster than any competitor.
about.value.1.title: Precision-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Design strategy only moves at the speed of alignment. Clear, conviction-driven communication with PM, Engineering, Data, and executive stakeholders is how great products ship.
about.value.2.title: Strategic communicator
about.value.3.desc: Design is measured by outcomes — conversion rates, trust metrics, task completion, and revenue impact. If it doesn't move a number, it needs to be rethought.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of deployment, insights generated by the AI persona platform directly informed targeted financial engagement strategies and customer-tier marketing — reversing a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% operating margin to +2%, improved customer retention and subscription renewals, increased average transaction value, and reduced friction for new member onboarding — demonstrating how responsibly applied agentic AI can drive measurable commercial outcomes when grounded in rigorous research and high-trust design principles.

modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals driven by real-time behavioral insights and targeted engagement.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average transaction value and customer lifetime value through intent-modeled product recommendations.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced new member acquisition friction and onboarding complexity by proactively surfacing needs at the right moment in the journey.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational intelligence across ~40 users spanning sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An agentic AI persona platform built on live business intelligence data — combining structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights to give teams a precise understanding of not just who customers are, but how and why they make financial decisions. Designed for trust, accuracy, and strategic action.

modal.project.0.title: AI Persona Agent
modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented platform experience spanning payment flows, member portals, consumer-facing reports, and internal operational tools. The goal was not visual refresh alone — it was a durable governance system that improved consistency, delivery velocity, and scalability across a five-person design organization, directly aligning design decisions with financial product outcomes and conversion goals.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in time to deliver
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More design deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer hours saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent design patterns across spend management, billing, and membership flows — eliminating inconsistency between designers and teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: Shared source of truth in Figma referenced directly in Contentful CMS — clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Direct alignment between UX strategy and fintech product goals by embedding conversion intent into system governance standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased autonomy and quality of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable component patterns and critique frameworks.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Earned executive trust by delivering visible, consistent design standards referenced across all product deliverables org-wide.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in the CMS, enabling designers, engineers, and business leaders to operate from a single source of truth. Design system adoption materially improved delivery speed, output quality, and team confidence — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic capability aligned to fintech product growth.

modal.project.2.challenge: I defined the experience strategy and design for a modernized membership join and subscription activation journey. The core challenge was twofold: making it genuinely easy for new members to enroll and activate a subscription in compliance with regulatory requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understood both the product value and the business opportunity — without confusion, friction, or erosion of financial trust.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified membership value proposition and subscription tiers — reducing hesitation and financial confusion at tier selection.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through clearer billing expectations, guardrails, and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class financial experience rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward higher engagement tiers and business-building participation.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable join and activation framework aligned with long-term retention, revenue growth, and customer trust.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes membership as a guided financial progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, subscription mechanics, and compliance requirements across landing pages, billing, and checkout. Designed to convert first-time visitors through a subscription-first model and confidently advance members toward higher-value engagement. The result is a scalable foundation that improves conversion, reduces abandonment at critical payment moments, and supports sustainable revenue growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the membership journey and aligning it with subscription-based financial engagement, early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence — directly supporting both revenue and long-term member success.

modal.project.2.title: Membership Join Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading end-to-end refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-growth platform facing critical revenue leakage from abandonment rates exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern fintech and e-commerce standards positioned this as a business recovery effort — rebuilding financial trust at the most consequential moment of the customer journey.
modal.project.4.kpi.0.label: Monthly Cart Interactions
modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Less Abandonment
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Trust in Experience

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Confidence-driven cart experience that addresses financial uncertainty and hesitation at the point of purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive load in checkout by eliminating unnecessary steps, ambiguity, and friction at billing decision points.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Subscriptions enabled as a first-class financial action directly within the cart — increasing attachment and revenue.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern fintech and retail UX standards, closing the gap with top-performing spend management platforms.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Revenue, retention, and trust metric growth through isolated, measurable spend and checkout UI improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring financial trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart — including subscriptions, upsell logic, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led product roadmap that aligns every interaction decision with measurable spend and conversion business outcomes.

modal.project.4.title: Cart & Checkout
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and design for a new sitewide intelligent search component addressing a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining conversion confidence and member trust at the earliest stage of the spend and purchase journey.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore trust in on-site discovery by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results at the most visible positions in the search experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by intelligently guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results — rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and spend actions through AI-powered product recommendations and upsell logic surfaced in-search.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent high-trust experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish intelligent search as a strategic platform growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership activation, and revenue retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core trust surface — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users when intent is unclear, and surface recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions at every touchpoint.
